source_registry.name: Stadt Leonding – Veranstaltungen
source_registry.notes: Custom CMS. List page gives date, time, venue, short blurb; no RSS found.

source_registry.name: Marktgemeinde Wilhering – Veranstaltungen
source_registry.notes: GEM2GO WEB platform. Chronological list with date/time/venue/organizer, detail pages; recurring club entries mixed in.

source_registry.name: Marktgemeinde Ottensheim – Veranstaltungen
source_registry.notes: RiS-Kommunal. Paginated list; some generic webinar cross-postings to filter.

source_registry.name: Gemeinde Puchenau – Veranstaltungen
source_registry.notes: GEM2GO WEB. Recurring weekly items (Bauernmarkt etc.) dominate; dedupe needed.

source_registry.name: Stadtgemeinde Steyregg – Veranstaltungskalender
source_registry.notes: Classic RiS-Kommunal aspx calendar with categories and clear date/time/venue/organizer.

source_registry.name: Marktgemeinde Hörsching – Veranstaltungen
source_registry.notes: GEM2GO WEB, precise time ranges; includes neighboring towns, filter by venue.

source_registry.name: OÖ Familienkarte – Veranstaltungskalender
source_registry.notes: TYPO3. Static fetch returns only today's events; date/district filtering needs form submit (params: date_from, date_to, districts_key — Linz Stadt=7, Linz Land=8, Urfahr-Umgebung=15; pagination /limitstart.N.html). Recrawler needs JS browser or replicated URL scheme.
